form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Johnnyreds Victory at this track over 1609m in a NW2500L4 on March 17 at $4.40. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3 m finishing second behind Sbrocco at this track over 1609m in a NW2500L4 on March 24 at $3.20. Has the ability to take this out.
